title: papaver nudicaule var. tenue
intro: Papaver nudicaule var. tenue, also known as the delicate meadow poppy, is a variant of the meadow poppy plant that is characterized by its slender stems and delicate, papery petals. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve respiratory issues. The health benefits of Papaver nudicaule var. tenue include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or tincture, or used in salves and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
